---
title: "Catalonia Fire Storyboard"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    storyboard: true
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(nanoparquet)
library(here)
library(scales)
library(naniar) 
library(skimr) 
library(patchwork)
library(VIM)
library(gt)
library(purrr)
library(forcats)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(gridExtra)
```

# 1. Data Import

```{r}
# Final dataset import
wfc_final2 <- read_csv(here("Data", "wfc_final2.csv"))

```


```{r}
# MAP

# Load libraries
library(leaflet)
library(dplyr)
library(crosstalk)

# 1. Data Preparation
wfc_map_data <- wfc_final2 %>%
  mutate(
    # Year MUST be numeric for the slider to work correctly
    year_num = as.numeric(as.character(year)),
    # Create the customized popup text in English
    popup_text = paste0(
      "<div style='font-family: Arial; font-size: 12px;'>",
      "<strong>Municipality:</strong> ", municipio, "<br>",
      "<strong>Year:</strong> ", year, "<br>",
      "<strong>Burnt Surface:</strong> ", superficie_total_forestal, " ha<br>",
      "<strong>Land Cover ID:</strong> ", land_cover_id, "<br>",
      "<strong>Cause:</strong> ", causa, "</div>"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(longitude, latitude, year_num, popup_text, superficie_total_forestal, municipio)

# 2. Create SharedData object
sd <- SharedData$new(wfc_map_data)

# 3. Interactive Layout with Slider
bscols(
  widths = c(12),
  # Year Slider
  filter_slider(
    id = "year_slider", 
    label = "Slide to navigate through years (1998-2022):", 
    sharedData = sd, 
    column = ~year_num,
    step = 1,          # Move year by year
    ticks = TRUE,      # Show year marks
    sep = "",          # Avoid commas in years (e.g., 2,022 -> 2022)
    width = "100%"
  ),
  # Leaflet Map
  leaflet(sd, width = "100%", height = 700) %>%
    addTiles() %>% 
    addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) %>%
    addCircleMarkers(
      lng = ~longitude, 
      lat = ~latitude,
      radius = ~sqrt(superficie_total_forestal) + 3, 
      color = "#E44D2E",
      stroke = TRUE,
      weight = 1,
      fillOpacity = 0.7,
      popup = ~popup_text,
      label = ~paste(municipio, "-", superficie_total_forestal, "ha")
    )
)
```
